sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
	FROM "Conference"  
		JOIN "hasConferenceMember" ON "Conference"."ID" = "hasConferenceMember"."Conference"  
		JOIN "Person" ON "hasConferenceMember"."ConferenceMember" = "Person"."ID"

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?abs) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?abs rdf:type :PaperAbstract}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?lbl 

WHERE {?pc rdf:type :Program_committee; rdfs:label ?lbl}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?pc) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?pc rdf:type :ProgramCommittee}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?paper rdf:type :PaperFullVersion}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?id 

WHERE {?abs rdf:type :PaperAbstract; :paperID ?id}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?rev) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?rev rdf:type :Reviewer}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?paper rdf:type :PaperFullVersion . 

	?author rdf:type :Reviewer; :hasBeenAssigned ?paper }
sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM "Paper"  
	JOIN "assignedTo" ON "Paper"."ID" = "assignedTo"."Paper"  
	JOIN "Person" ON "assignedTo"."Reviewer" = "Person"."ID"

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?conf) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?conf rdf:type :Conference}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?paper rdf:type :PaperFullVersion; :hasAuthor ?author . 

	?author rdf:type :Author }

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?name 

WHERE {?p rdf:type :Person; :name ?name}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?review rdf:type :Review . 

	?reviewer rdf:type :Reviewer; :writeReview ?review}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?auth) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?auth rdf:type :Author}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?dt 

WHERE {?c rdf:type :Conference; :date ?dt}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?url 

WHERE {?c rdf:type :Conference; :siteURL ?url}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?text 

WHERE {?rev rdf:type :Review; rdfs:comment ?text}

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT ?email 

WHERE {?p rdf:type :Person; :email ?email}

prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) 

	WHERE {?paper rdf:type :PaperFullVersion . 

	?author rdf:type :Co-author; :co-writePaper ?paper }
sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM "Paper"  
	JOIN "co-writePaper" ON "Paper"."ID" = "co-writePaper"."Paper"  
	JOIN "Person" ON "co-writePaper"."Co-author" = "Person"."ID"

sparql_query:
prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> 

prefix : <http://cmt#> 

SELECT (COUNT(?doc) AS ?count) 

WHERE {?doc rdf:type :Document}

sql_query:
SELECT COUNT(*)  
	FROM "ProgramCommittee"  
	JOIN "hasProgramCommitteeMember" ON "ProgramCommittee"."ID" = "hasProgramCommitteeMember"."ProgramCommittee"  
	JOIN "ProgramCommitteeMember" ON "hasProgramCommitteeMember"."ProgramCommitteeMember" = "ProgramCommitteeMember"."ID"  
	JOIN "Person" ON "ProgramCommitteeMember"."ID" = "Person"."ID"

SELECT ?name 

WHERE {?c rdf:type :Conference; :name ?name}
